message:
fix: code review cleanup — type safety, dead code, div-by-zero guards

- Remove `as any` cast in MCP handler, use proper OutputFormatInput type
- Remove unsafe `as { elements?: unknown[] }` casts on typed ExcalidrawFile
- Remove unused `formats` variable and `dealloc` WASM interface
- Remove dead `findEdgeSpline()` (~100 lines) from layout.zig
- Add division-by-zero guards in fixedPoint calculations
